description: ExternalSecretRewriteMerge defines configuration for merging secret values.

conflictPolicy.description: Used to define the policy to use in conflict resolution.

into.description: Used to define the target key of the merge operation. Required if strategy is JSON. Ignored otherwise.

priority.description: Used to define key priority in conflict resolution.

priorityPolicy.description: Used to define the policy when a key in the priority list does not exist in the input.

strategy.description: Used to define the strategy to use in the merge operation.
